purpose: Q8H-0 preflight for q8 FFN handwritten oracle research path

tinygrad_q8_consumer_preflight.command: PYTHONPATH=. DEV=AMD DEBUG=2 python3 extra/q8_1_q4k_bench.py /home/ubuntu/models/Qwen3-8B-Q4_K_M.gguf --device AMD --tensor blk.0.ffn_gate.weight --rows 12288 --kernel vdot_builtin --iters 3 --tol 2e-2
tinygrad_q8_consumer_preflight.note: Graph contains current tinygrad q8 pack + q8 u32 bias pack + Q4_K q8 consumer + reduction. It is a correctness/layout preflight, not the target economics.

handwritten_mmvq_speed_preflight.caveat: Synthetic random Q4_K/q8_1 data; does not verify real GGUF scale/min unpacking, q8 subchunk mapping, or model correctness.

verdict: Q8H-0 PASS: existing tinygrad q8 layout oracle and handwritten speed skeleton are reusable; next gate is correctness-first handwritten MMVQ on real GGUF.
